---
name: Question & Support
about: Ask a question or get help using Backrooms Bounded
title: QUESTION
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

**What is your question?**
Please write your question clearly here. (e.g., "How do I get to the backrooms?", "Is there a config file to change spawn rates?")

**What are you trying to achieve?**
A short description of what you are trying to do in the game or with the mod files.

**Minecraft & Mod Version**
- Minecraft Version: [e.g. 1.21.1]
- BackroomsBounded Version: [e.g. 0.5 Beta]

**Additional Context**
Add any extra details, screenshots, or logs that might help answer your question
